title: Overworld Mirror
description: Just adds a new dimension that is nearly a mirror of the overworld
body:
This mod adds a new dimension to the world which is a mirror of the overworld. You can adjust the seed, worldtype, generatorsettings and movement factor in the config file.

  ### This mod require [uteamcore](https://modrinth.com/mod/u-team-core)!

  The portal is created the following way: ![Portal Frame before creating the portal](https://i.imgur.com/fEaA48K.png)  **Shift** + right click a flower with the bonemeal ![Portal after creating one](https://i.imgur.com/HOdItrP.png) ### Here is a Video how to create the portal: [https://i.imgur.com/lmkGDqE.mp4](https://i.imgur.com/lmkGDqE.mp4)   This mod can be packed in every modpack you want.
[Sourcecode](https://github.com/MC-U-Team/Overworld-Mirror) is linked above and is available under Apache License 2.0.
Report Bugs on github.
